violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Raw animal foods (such as beef patties) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as shredded lettuce and sliced tomatoes) in the 2-door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the side entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2025

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The chest freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. The lid was observed separated with insulation exposed. Establishment is to repair or replace unit. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the slushie chest freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to repair floor so that it is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The floors in the kitchen prep area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
